name: Wok Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
Choose at least 2 vegetables from each group; dice them.
Group 1:
1/2 cup turnips
1 cup asparagus
1/4 cup carrots
1 cup broccoli
1 cup potatoes
Group 2:
1 cup onion
1/2 cup cauliflower
1 cup celery
1 cup string beans
1 1/2 cups snow peas
Group 3:
1 1/2 cups sprouts
1 cup lettuce
1/2 cup spinach
1 cup tomatoes
1 cup mushrooms
1 1/2 cups water chestnuts
Heat the oil in a wok or large skillet. Add garlic and stir-fry for about 30 seconds.
Add the vegetables from Group 1 and stir-fry for 7 minutes until they are tender-crisp.
Add the vegetables from Group 2 and stir-fry for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the vegetables from Group 3 and stir-fry for another 5 minutes, or until all vegetables are cooked to your desired tenderness.
Serve over hot rice. Garnish with cashews. Serves 4
